title: Grave Gunner
description:
Fill the boots of the Grave Gunner, an expert gunslinger, in this fast-paced arena shooter. 
Face off against swarms of undead creatures in a dark, gothic graveyard, employing expressive movement to evade them and powerful handguns to slay them.

• Conquer thirteen waves of ever-increasing difficulty.

• Disintegrate a cast of distinct monster types using satisfying and responsive weapons.

• Express your FPS movement skills with techniques such as sliding, rocket jumping, and bunny hopping.

• Absorb gems from slain monsters to regain your health and stay in the fight longer.

While the basic mechanics are easy to pick up, great skill is required to master the intricacies of the movement and the quick aim to vanquish your enemies swiftly.
The early waves should be relatively easy for veteran FPS players, introducing the various enemy types that you will be encountering. The later waves, however, quickly ramp up in difficulty. Only the most elite gunslingers shall defeat the final, almost impossible waves.

Each part of the arena is meticulously designed to encourage interesting movement. Crawl spaces can be slid under, disguised monsters force quick reflexes, and towers containing ammo require vertical momentum to reach.
description_short: A fast-paced gothic arena FPS focusing on stellar game feel. Survive as a gunslinger against waves of monsters, utilising smooth and expressive movement, sliding, rocket jumping, and formidable duel handguns.
